⚡ TRUMP-O-METER — 2026-04-17
────────────────────────────────────
Mood:    TRIUMPHANT
Target:  Iran and regional adversaries
────────────────────────────────────
Aggression       ████████░░ 8/10
Erraticism       ████████░░ 8/10
Market Risk      ███████░░░ 7/10
Geo. Tension     █████████░ 9/10
Dom. Heat        ███████░░░ 7/10
────────────────────────────────────
COMPOSITE    7.8/10
────────────────────────────────────
📡 Trump is operating in a manic, victory-focused state while simultaneously escalating military tensions in Iran. His chaotic Truth Social posting combined with aggressive policy announcements suggests he's energized by perceived diplomatic wins but increasingly volatile in execution.

His chaotic Truth Social posting combined with aggressive policy announcements suggests he's energized by perceived diplomatic wins but increasingly volatile in execution.
